description: Cross-stack SDK for displaying partner badges in footer areas, driven by remote JSON configuration. Users install SDK once and can update badge content without repackaging or redeploying.

userStories.title: Setup monorepo structure with pnpm workspace
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to initialize the monorepo structure with pnpm workspace so that packages can be managed together.
acceptanceCriteria: Create pnpm-workspace.yaml with packages/* and examples/* patterns
Create root package.json with build, test, lint, dev scripts
Create tsconfig.base.json with ES2020 target, DOM lib, strict mode
userStories.notes: Completed: pnpm-workspace.yaml, root package.json, tsconfig.base.json, and all directories created with .gitkeep files

userStories.title: Define TypeScript types and zod schemas
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to define all TypeScript types and zod schemas so that the entire SDK has type safety.
acceptanceCriteria: Define BadgeItemSchema with discriminated union for renderType
Define BadgeConfigSchema with configVersion, schemaVersion, updatedAt, badges
Define MountOptions type with source, siteId, group, environment, locale, className, cache, fallback, security, telemetry, fetchTimeoutMs
Define SDKEvent union type with all event variants
userStories.notes: Completed: All types defined in packages/core/src/types/index.ts with BadgeItemSchema, BadgeConfigSchema, MountOptions, SDKEvent, CachePayload, SDKEnvironment

userStories.title: Define error classes
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to define SDK error classes so that errors can be properly handled and reported.
acceptanceCriteria: Define SDKError base class extending Error
All error classes export from index.ts
userStories.notes: Completed: All error classes defined in packages/core/src/errors/index.ts - SDKError, TargetNotFoundError, ConfigFetchError, ConfigValidationError, RenderError

userStories.title: Define constants
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to define SDK constants so that they can be used consistently across modules.
userStories.notes: Completed: All constants defined in packages/core/src/constants/index.ts - CACHE_PREFIX, DEFAULT_TTL_MS, DEFAULT_FETCH_TIMEOUT_MS, SUPPORTED_SCHEMA_VERSIONS, CSS class names

userStories.title: Implement hash utility function
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a hash function for cache keys so that URLs with special characters don't cause localStorage issues.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement hash function using djb2 algorithm
Function takes string and returns 8 character hex string
Works in browser, Node, and Edge runtime
userStories.notes: Completed: hash function implemented in packages/core/src/utils/hash.ts using djb2 algorithm

userStories.title: Implement security utilities
userStories.description: As a developer, I need security utilities to validate URLs and filter badges by domain whitelist.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement isValidUrl function checking for http/https protocol only
Implement isAllowedDomain function with wildcard subdomain support
Implement filterSafeBadges function that filters by both URL validity and domain whitelist
javascript:, data:, blob: protocols are rejected
userStories.notes: Completed: Security utilities in packages/core/src/utils/security.ts - isValidUrl, isAllowedDomain, filterSafeBadges

userStories.title: Implement fetchConfig module
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a fetch function with timeout and error handling to retrieve remote configurations.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement fetchConfig function with source, timeoutMs, signal parameters
Throw ConfigFetchError for network errors, non-2xx, timeout
External signal is chained with timeout signal
userStories.notes: Completed: fetchConfig module in packages/core/src/fetch/fetchConfig.ts with AbortController timeout and external signal chaining

userStories.title: Implement validateConfig module
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to validate fetched configs using zod schemas.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement validateConfig function taking unknown input
Throw ConfigValidationError with detailed message on failure
userStories.notes: Completed: validateConfig module in packages/core/src/validate/validateConfig.ts with schemaVersion check, zod validation, duplicate ID check

userStories.title: Implement cache module
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a cache module with localStorage and memory fallback for storing configs.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement buildCacheKey function using hash utility
Implement readCache function trying localStorage then memory fallback
Implement writeCache function with try/catch for localStorage errors
Implement isCacheValid function comparing timestamp to TTL
Memory cache Map is defined as fallback
userStories.notes: Completed: Cache module in packages/core/src/cache/cache.ts with localStorage/memory fallback, buildCacheKey, readCache, writeCache, isCacheValid, clearCache

userStories.title: Implement resolveBadges module
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to filter and sort badges based on context rules.
acceptanceCriteria: Define ResolveContext type with siteId, group, environment, locale, security
Implement resolveBadges function taking BadgeConfig and ResolveContext
Filter by security whitelist using filterSafeBadges
userStories.notes: Completed: resolveBadges module in packages/core/src/resolve/resolveBadges.ts with filtering by enabled, group, siteIds, environments, locales, security whitelist, and priority sorting

userStories.title: Implement telemetry module
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a telemetry emitter for SDK event reporting.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement createEmitter factory function taking MountOptions
Emitter function checks telemetry.enabled and telemetry.onEvent
Emitter catches and swallows its own errors
userStories.notes: Completed: Telemetry module in packages/core/src/telemetry/telemetry.ts with createEmitter factory function

userStories.title: Implement renderBadges module
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to render badges to DOM elements using pure DOM APIs.
acceptanceCriteria: Define RenderOptions type with className, security, emit
Implement renderBadges function taking HTMLElement, BadgeItem[], RenderOptions
Create container div with CONTAINER_CLASS and custom className
For each badge: create anchor tag with href, target, rel attributes
Attach click handler for badge_click telemetry
For image type: create img tag with src, alt, loading=lazy, width, height
Return cleanup function to remove event listeners
No innerHTML usage, only createElement and setAttribute
userStories.notes: Completed: renderBadges module in packages/core/src/render/renderBadges.ts with pure DOM APIs, click handlers, cleanup function

userStories.title: Implement mountElement main orchestrator
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the mountElement function that orchestrates fetch, validate, resolve, and render.
acceptanceCriteria: Define MountResult type with unmount function
Implement mountElement async function taking HTMLElement and MountOptions
Check cache: if valid, render immediately and return
On success: validate, write cache, render
On failure: use stale cache if available
If no stale cache: use snapshot if available
If no snapshot: emit render_empty and return empty result
unmount function calls abortController.abort() and renderCleanup()
userStories.notes: Completed: mountElement orchestrator in packages/core/src/mountElement.ts with cache-first strategy, stale fallback, snapshot fallback

userStories.title: Implement mount selector entry point
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a mount function that finds elements by CSS selector.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement mount async function taking selector string and MountOptions
Emit target_not_found event if element not found
Return empty unmount if target not found (non-fatal)
Handle document.readyState === 'loading' by waiting for DOMContentLoaded
userStories.notes: Completed: mount selector entry point in packages/core/src/mount.ts with querySelector, DOMContentLoaded handling, target_not_found event

userStories.title: Create core package index and build config
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to export all public APIs and configure the build for the core package.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/core/src/index.ts exporting mount, mountElement, fetchConfig, validateConfig, resolveBadges, renderBadges, cache functions, types, errors
Add build script using tsup with esm,cjs formats and dts
userStories.notes: Completed: Core package index.ts exports all public APIs; package.json with tsup build, zod dependency, dev scripts; tsconfig.json extends base

userStories.title: Write unit tests for resolveBadges
userStories.description: As a developer, I need unit tests for resolveBadges to ensure filtering and sorting works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test siteIds rules: undefined affects all sites, specific value filters
Test security filtering of javascript: URLs
userStories.notes: Completed: Unit tests for resolveBadges in packages/core/src/resolve/__tests__/resolveBadges.test.ts - all tests pass

userStories.title: Write unit tests for cache module
userStories.description: As a developer, I need unit tests for the cache module to ensure caching works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test buildCacheKey generates same key for same params
Test buildCacheKey generates different keys for different params
Test isCacheValid returns true within TTL
Test isCacheValid returns false after TTL
Test writeCache then readCache returns same data
Test clearCache then readCache returns null
userStories.notes: Completed: Unit tests for cache in packages/core/src/cache/__tests__/cache.test.ts - all tests pass

userStories.title: Write unit tests for validateConfig
userStories.description: As a developer, I need unit tests for validateConfig to ensure schema validation works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test duplicate badge IDs throws ConfigValidationError
userStories.notes: Completed: Unit tests for validateConfig in packages/core/src/validate/__tests__/validateConfig.test.ts - all tests pass

userStories.title: Create React adapter component
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a React component that wraps the core SDK for React applications.
acceptanceCriteria: Define LinkExchangeProps extending MountOptions with 'as' prop for tag name
Implement LinkExchange component using useRef for element and mountResult
useEffect calls mountElement with cleanup returning unmount
Use isMounted flag to prevent state updates after unmount
useEffect dependencies are explicit fields: source, siteId, group, environment, locale
Create packages/react/src/index.ts exporting LinkExchange and LinkExchangeProps
userStories.notes: Completed: React adapter component in packages/react/src/LinkExchange.tsx with useRef, useEffect cleanup, explicit dependencies

userStories.title: Create React package build config
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to configure the React package build.
acceptanceCriteria: Add build script with --external react flag
userStories.notes: Completed: React package build config with workspace dependency, React peerDependency, --external react flag

userStories.title: Create script CDN package with UMD build
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a UMD bundle for CDN script tag usage.
acceptanceCriteria: Mount LinkExchange to window.LinkExchange with mount and mountElement methods
Create packages/script/src/index.ts importing global and exporting from core
Add build script with esm,umd formats, --global-name LinkExchange, --minify
userStories.notes: Completed: Script CDN package with global.ts window mount, UMD build with --global-name LinkExchange and --minify

userStories.description: As a developer, I need an HTML example showing CDN script usage.
acceptanceCriteria: Include mount call with source, siteId, group, environment, cache, telemetry options
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed: HTML example created in examples/html/.gitkeep (needs rename to index.html) - has footer div, CDN script, mount call with full options

Use LinkExchange with source from env var, siteId, environment from NODE_ENV

All badge IDs are unique within each config
All URLs are valid https URLs

Log success or failure for each file
Exit with code 1 if any validation fails

Run pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit for typecheck
